name: Chocolate Toffee Crescent Bars
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Pillsbury Refrigerated Quick Crescent Dough
1 cup semi-sweet or milk chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Pat the separated crescent dough into an ungreased 15-inch x 10-inch jelly roll pan, sealing perforations.
3. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and butter and boil for 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the dough and sprinkle with nuts.
5. Bake for 14 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from oven.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the bars.
7. Return to oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, swirling chocolate to distribute unevenly.
8. Cool before cutting.
Note: Do NOT substitute margarine for the butter. My friend Regina made these and they were wonderful. I gave the recipe to my mother and hers were at best mediocre. I questioned her as to what she had changed and it was the substitution of margarine for the butter.
